title: Breed More Mobs
description: Tame and breed more mobs than in vanilla
body:
# Breed More Mobs

---

Breed More Mobs is a server-side mod that lets you breed mobs that can't be bred in vanilla.  
This mod also adds the ability to tame skeleton horses and zombie horses.  

![skeleton horse with hearts and a family of parrots](https://github.com/kgriff0n/breed-more-mobs/raw/master/img/horse_and_parrots.png)

| Entity         | Related Items      |
|----------------|--------------------|
| Parrot         | Seeds              |
| Polar Bear     | Fishes             |
| Skeleton Horse | Raw & Cooked Meats |
| Zombie Horse   | Raw & Cooked Meats |
| Happy Ghast    | Snowballs          |

Parrots and polar bears have been added to the **Two By Two** achievement, which now requires 27 mobs to complete.  

![two by two achievement with 27 mobs](https://github.com/kgriff0n/breed-more-mobs/raw/master/img/achievement.png)
